description: Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, Parfum, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Polyquaternium-10, Disodium EDTA, Panthenol, Vitis Vinifera Seed Oil, Pyrus Malus Juice, Pantolactone, Benzophenone-4, PPG-6, Sodium Hydroxide, Benzyl Alcohol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool, CI 19140, CI 15985, CI 42090 Directions Wet hair, use a good amount of shampoo, lather and rinse thoroughly.
